sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport stock trades around recent lows as intermodal margins tighten
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport stock is trading near recent lows due to tightening intermodal margins and lower demand, reflecting a tougher freight environment. The company's earnings have normalized from pandemic-era peaks, prompting a focus on cost efficiency, technology integration, and diversified service offerings to stabilize performance. Investors are evaluating J.B. Hunt's ability to manage cyclical pressures while leveraging its structural strengths and customer relationships.

feed.title: Albemarle stock trades steady as lithium pricing shapes earnings outlook
feed.summary: Albemarle stock reflects a cautious lithium market, with recent earnings showing lower revenue and adjusted EBITDA as contract and spot prices reset. The company's financial performance highlights how commodity pricing now drives earnings more than volume alone, leading to reduced revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and net income compared to prior years. Investors are closely monitoring Albemarle's guidance, capital spending plans, and demand trends in EV and energy storage applications, which will significantly influence the stock's future valuation and performance.

feed.title: First Horizon names Scott Serpico as head of product
feed.summary: First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) has appointed Scott Serpico as Senior Vice President, Head of Product. In this Memphis-based role, Serpico will oversee the strategy for First Horizon Bank's product portfolio, which includes credit cards, deposits, lending, and emerging payments. He previously served as executive leader for Consumer Lending at USAA and held leadership positions at Ally Financial, Chase, SunTrust, Wells Fargo, and MBNA.
